{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crystal Conch Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10706
|idx=64
|description=This spiny crystal tail is shielded by a spiral shell that protects its weakest point. One strike from its reinforced hammer — and few opponents remain standing.
|skill=On combat start, summon a Shell Storm to attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 120% of ATK!
|hp=2250
|def=233
|atk=369
|rush=243
|gene1=For Round 1, DMG +10%
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene3=DMG +5%
|gene4=Earth DMG +120
|gene5=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene6=Ignore DEF +2%
|gene7=For Round 1, DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
